mapper.sql: SELECT ir.id, ir.register_id, ir.medical_technology_id, ir.inspection_info, ir.inspection_position, ir.inspection_remark, ir.inspection_state, ir.inspection_result, ir.inspection_time, ir.creation_time, ir.inspection_employee_id, ir.inputinspection_employee_id, r.case_number, r.real_name AS patient_name, mt.tech_name, mt.tech_code FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN register r ON r.id = ir.register_id AND (r.patient_id IS NULL OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient p WHERE p.id = r.patient_id AND p.delmark = 1 )) INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id
mapper.select:
WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId}
ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC, ir.id DESC

WHERE ir.inspection_state = #{inspectionState}
ORDER BY ir.creation_time ASC, ir.id ASC

WHERE ir.inspection_state = '待检验'
ORDER BY ir.creation_time ASC, ir.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_state = #{inspectionState} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_time = #{inspectionTime} WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_result = #{inspectionResult}, inspection_state = #{inspectionState}, inspection_time = #{inspectionTime}, inspection_remark = #{inspectionRemark}, inputinspection_employee_id = #{inputinspectionEmployeeId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inspection_request SET inspection_result = #{inspectionResult} WHERE id = #{id}
